channel.title: Devtools on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Devtools on Arrans github.io

item.title: ministackorg/ministack
item.description: Ministack: Free, open-source local AWS emulator - 35+ services, Terraform compatible, real databases. Free forever. MIT licensed.

item.title: iib0011/omni-tools
item.description: Self-hosted collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks. No ads, no tracking, just fast, accessible utilities right from your browser!

item.title: algorismo-au/lanekeep
item.description: Governance guardrails and insights for AI coding agents

item.title: goatplatform/goatdb
item.description: A peer-to-peer database that spans devices. For apps and agents that work everywhere.

item.title: muety/anchr
item.description: ⚓️ Anchr provides you with a toolbox for tiny tasks on the internet, especially bookmark collections
